title: Fragment: 'My Head Is Wild With Weeping'.
content:
My head is wild with weeping for a grief
    Which is the shadow of a gentle mind.
    I walk into the air (but no relief
    To seek, - or haply, if I sought, to find;
    It came unsought); - to wonder that a chief
    Among men's spirits should be cold and blind.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Percy Bysshe Shelley delivers a powerful performance in "Fragment: 'My Head Is Wild With Weeping'."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
